title: Rival Species
desc: In the far distant future of the 40th millennium behind the stars there is only war. Enter the universe of WARHAMMER 40,000 and play a mighty warrior for one out of an ever growing list of rival species. A large PvP team multiplayer mod for Half-Life that plays similary to Battlefield/Battlefront, based on the Game's Workshop property. Eventually Exterminatus, A sequel for the Source Engine would be made

title: A Very Corporate Escape Room
desc: This is no ordinary escape room; this is A Very Corporate Escape Room. In this first person 3D puzzle adventure you will solve challenges, unlock secret locations and uncover the dark truth about your manager in a chilling satire of office life.

title: Power Guy World
desc: Power Guy World is a 30 exit SMW romhack created by LucasMegaStriker as a tribute to the Vtuber "Power Guy".

title: Pac-Man Museum+
desc: A compilation of 14 Pac-Man titles. Players can earn coins by playing the games to purchase items to decorate an in-game arcade.

title: Ace wo Nerae!
desc: A tennis game for the Super Famicom based on the 1970s manga and anime of the same name.

title: The Deal
desc: A Doom II WAD.

title: Nightmare Kart: The Old Karts
desc: An upcoming free expansion to Nightmare Kart with a brand new mini-campaign, racers, karts, tracks, power-ups, and game modes.

title: Hole io: Blossom Edition
desc: No description available

title: Chomp Chomp
desc:
The bad ghosts have scared the Chomplets away and captured them all in cages! Help Chomp Chomp rescue the captured Chomplets by collecting keys and opening the cages, while you keep Chomp Chomp fed by eating pellets, and by eating power pellets to unleash Chomp's power to pay the ghosts back one Chomp at a time! 
 
Customize your Chomp: 
Make your Chomp feel special as you customize with hats, eyes, teeth, and color! In any combination you want! 
 
Upgrade your Chomp: 
Make your Chomp Chomp healthier, faster, and stronger so he can defeat the ghost army! 
 
Chomplet Farm: 
Watch your Chomplets play in their farm! Idle and you can feed them, and earn extra coins to buy upgrades for your Chomp! 
 
Adventure: 
Endless levels that increasingly get harder the further you make it, how far can you make it before the ghost army catches you! See how far you've made it with the highest score and highest level achieved stats! 
 
Well, what are you waiting for? Save the Chomplets, eat some pellets, and Chomp some ghosts!

title: Satella-Q: Mou Sugu Haru desu ne - Chotto Sate-Q Shimasen ka?
desc: A single-episode season of Satella-Q.

title: BanG Dream! Girls Band Party! for Nintendo Switch
desc:
Popular rhythm game in Japan!
Tap to the rhythm of over 200 songs to choose from.
Play both original and cover songs from popular J-Pop artists and anime songs!
Play your favorite songs on a level of difficulty that suits you!

title: Code Trainer
desc: Code Trainer is a programming practice tool. Solve coding problems and improve your understanding of computer science. Prior programming experience is required.

title: Suna no Embrace: Eden no Sato no Never
desc: A RPG set in a desert fantasy world where water is the most valued resource.

title: Ultimate Frolf Chaos!
desc: Just an average multiplayer golfing game for up to eight players... with FROGS?

title: Wubble Bubbles
desc: No description available

title: Dragon Defense
desc: Dragon Defense is an action-packed, wave-based defense strategy game where you must build, craft, and protect your island from relentless monster invasions.

title: Umineko: Ougon Musou Kyoku - Cross
desc:
A tag-team fighting game based around the Umineko no Naku Koro ni universe of visual novels, Cross is the followup to 2010's Ougon Musou Kyoku.

In this version George, Jessica, and Rosa from the Ushiromiya family join the fray.

title: Skynet Rising : Portal to the Past
desc: Welcome to the world of Skynet Rising. From the mastermind creator Dr. Rex Havoc, Skynet Rising is a top notch action packed “Super Sandbox FPS”. Explore a beautifully crafted post apocalyptic world. Survive and conquer command towers through tough gun battles. Fight back to back with your brother in arms. Featuring a high adrenaline single player campaign, the game has a wickedly great Run and Gun gameplay with tons of "Shoot them in the face" fun.

title: Merge Games Horror Bundle
desc: What do dark Nordic fables, intergalactic cruises and Lovecraftian gore all have in common? Gruesome, gory and ghoulish monsters! Dive into the horror-themed worlds of Bramble: The Mountain King, Morbid: The Seven Acolytes and Slaycation Paradise - if you dare!

title: Pica
desc: This is a casual jigsaw puzzle game. All you need to do is use the mouse to drag the pieces to the correct positions, and when you complete the puzzle and form a complete picture, you can unlock the picture gallery.
